description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow with a sprawling, L-shaped footprint set on a grassy plot. The structure features a low-pitched, multi-tiered hip roof in dark gray, with wide overhangs and clean, angular lines. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, likely stucco or painted concrete, and the building includes numerous large windows and glass doors, especially along the longer wing. A covered porch or veranda is visible, providing sheltered outdoor space. The bungalow appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back and partially cantilevered over the lower floor. The overall design is contemporary, with an emphasis on horizontal lines and open, airy spaces.
description: A large, modern L-shaped bungalow with a dark hip roof, light exterior walls, and extensive windows. Features include a covered porch and two stories with a contemporary, open design.
description_view_0: This view highlights the long, low front facade, the main entrance area, and the wide, dark roof overhangs.
description_view_1: This angle shows the side of the bungalow with a visible covered porch and a concentration of windows and doors.
description_view_2: This view emphasizes the L-shaped layout, the extensive window arrangements, and the setback upper story.
description_view_3: From this perspective, the rear wing and the full length of the building are visible, along with the roof's multi-tiered structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
